full_content: Deliberation Archive record DELIB-0876: owner directive and Prime Builder investigation for a durable session work subject toggle. The record captures the problem statement, subject-scope failure cases, prior deliberation evidence, and the handoff to bridge/gtkb-session-work-subject-001.md for Loyal Opposition review before implementation.
explicit_change_request: Owner requested: investigate session subject, create a list of incorrect-subject cases, create an implementation proposal, and record the investigation details in the Deliberation Archive.
change_reason: Archive owner directive and investigation for durable session work subject proposal.
